tools.name: search_titles
tools.description: Use when you need to find movies or TV shows by title in TMDB. Returns a normalized list with id, type, title, year, overview and poster URL.

tools.name: get_details
tools.description: Use when you already have a TMDB id and media type and need canonical details. Returns overview, genres, runtime/seasons/episodes, poster and homepage when available.

tools.name: get_watch_providers
tools.description: Use when you need where-to-watch availability by country. Returns link plus flatrate/free/rent/buy providers for the resolved region.
